career.name: OSC MiniHack Hackathon
career.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Developed a Chrome extension in 24 hours using React and Node.js that leverages Google Gemini AI to provide writing assistance on the fly with customizable tones and styles
In charge of AI integration, frontend development, and chrome extension conversion
Recognized as 1 of 2 projects for Best Project Demo out of 53 submissions

career.name: UF Sase
career.title: Backend Developer (Newly Joined)
description: Selected to join the backend team, maintaining and extending the UF SASE website to support club operations.
Currently onboarding to the techstack (TypeScript, Hono, Turso, Drizzle, Bun) and preparing for future contributions

career.name: JukeBox
career.title: Frontend Developer
description: Build a public landing page for JukeBox, an open-source music queueing system designed for users to interact with and manage a shared music playlist
Implemented the UI using React, TypeScript, and SASS/SCSS, closely following designs from Figma
